mapping.b_element: deformed logarithmic function used in generalized entropy definitions

mapping.a_element: deduced logarithmic function associated with deformed exponentials
mapping.b_element: generalized entropy functions derived from deformed logarithms

mapping.a_element: generalized thermostatistics formulated using deformed exponentials and deduced logarithms
mapping.b_element: generalized entropy and relative entropy definitions in nonextensive thermostatistics

brief_justification: Both papers rely on the same underlying machinery of deformed logarithmic and exponential functions to construct generalized thermostatistics or entropy measures. The kappa-deformation in A corresponds to the deformed logarithms in B, and both frameworks use these functions to define or analyze entropy-related properties.
